scripts.build: prisma generate && prisma db push --accept-data-loss && next build
scripts.stage-15-02: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const cwd=process.cwd();const files=['src/lib/vehicle-hierarchy.ts','src/components/features/entities/vehicle-tree-view.tsx','src/components/features/entities/vehicle-org-chart.tsx','src/components/features/entities/vehicle-cards-view.tsx','src/lib/__tests__/phase15-entity-hierarchy.test.ts','src/types/react-organizational-chart.d.ts','package.json'];files.forEach(f=>{try{execSync('git add '+JSON.stringify(f),{stdio:'inherit',cwd});console.log('OK',f)}catch(e){console.error('ERR',f)}})" && git commit -m 'feat(15-02): add vehicle hierarchy components + buildTree utility + ENTITY-01 tests'
scripts.stage-15-02-task2: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const cwd=process.cwd();const files=['src/app/(gp)/entities/page.tsx','.planning/phases/15-entity-management-meeting-intelligence/15-02-SUMMARY.md','.planning/STATE.md','.planning/ROADMAP.md'];files.forEach(f=>{try{execSync('git add '+JSON.stringify(f),{stdio:'inherit',cwd});console.log('OK',f)}catch(e){console.error('ERR',f)}})" && git commit -m 'feat(15-02): add 4 view mode toggle to Vehicles list page + update planning docs'
